query:
INSERT INTO bridge_academy_topics (subjectCode, subjectName, topicNumber, topicName, description, estimatedHours, difficultyLevel) VALUES
-- Mathematical Reasoning (MATH)
('MATH', 'Mathematical Reasoning', 1, 'Numbers and Operations', 'Whole numbers, decimals, fractions, percentages, and basic arithmetic operations', 2, 'easy'),
('MATH', 'Mathematical Reasoning', 2, 'Algebra and Functions', 'Linear equations, inequalities, polynomials, and function concepts', 2, 'medium'),
('MATH', 'Mathematical Reasoning', 3, 'Geometry and Measurement', 'Shapes, angles, area, volume, and coordinate geometry', 2, 'medium'),

-- Reasoning Through Language Arts (RLA)
('RLA', 'Reasoning Through Language Arts', 1, 'Reading Comprehension', 'Understanding main ideas, details, inferences, and author purpose in texts', 2, 'easy'),
('RLA', 'Reasoning Through Language Arts', 2, 'Grammar and Writing', 'Sentence structure, grammar rules, punctuation, and writing mechanics', 2, 'medium'),
('RLA', 'Reasoning Through Language Arts', 3, 'Essay Writing', 'Essay organization, argumentation, supporting evidence, and revision', 2, 'medium'),

-- Science
('SCI', 'Science', 1, 'Life Science', 'Biology, cells, genetics, evolution, and human body systems', 2, 'easy'),
('SCI', 'Science', 2, 'Physical Science', 'Physics, chemistry, energy, motion, and matter properties', 2, 'medium'),
('SCI', 'Science', 3, 'Earth and Space Science', 'Geology, weather, climate, astronomy, and environmental science', 2, 'medium'),

-- Social Studies
('SS', 'Social Studies', 1, 'U.S. History', 'American history from colonial times to present, key events and figures', 2, 'easy'),
('SS', 'Social Studies', 2, 'Civics and Government', 'U.S. government structure, Constitution, rights, and civic responsibilities', 2, 'medium'),
('SS', 'Social Studies', 3, 'Economics and Geography', 'Economic systems, world geography, cultures, and global issues', 2, 'medium');
